review_text: Short drive to Freemantle and other local,attractions. Park has spotless amenities, a great camp kitchen and welcoming staff
Great park. Short stroll to the beach. Very quiet park and amenities are good and clean.
This place is amazing, a close walk to the beach.. its heaven and close to Perth.. love love love this place!!

We stayed here for two nights, cabins are over priced and dated. It’s located by the beach. However it’s lacking amenities and activities for the kids. This place is good for adults and people stopping for just one night. We wont go back. The cabin bathrooms were in bad shape. Definitely needs an upgrade.
Awesome site, managers are so helpful at all times, highly reccomend staying here
Easy check in, great location, great amenities. Probably the best I've had on my south West WA trip ⭐️

Great location and great facilities. It feels like a safe place to stay. The communal areas are big and tidy. They have couches and a tv to relax and a pool table. A short walk to the beach just over the dunes.

Lovely small caravan park by the beach. So convenient for port coogee and Fremantle!
Stayed with our caravan

Hubby and I stayed here for a total of 10 nights in a roof top tent. Discovery Parks Coogee Beach had some good points and some bad points for us. Staff were friendly, facilities clean and location top notch. Down side points… camp kitchen did not open until 7am which was not ideal for us as we were commuting to work and were up at 5am and needed the camp kitchen… our site was horrible (site number 45). It was basically a sandpit, horrible to get around in, other sites looked much nicer as they had been mulched to get you up out of the sand… the homeless made me feel at times a little unsafe going to the bathroom in the dark at night and early in the morning. Actually found a group of 3 trying to break into the toilets at 5am in the morning. Don’t think we would stay here again.

Having needed to get out of the rain for the cyclone, the lovely lady at the desk (deb I think was her name) got us an upgrade sorted to a cabin for the night. Super easy after hours check in, really friendly front of house staff. Bed was super comfy.
Great stay here, spotless room and plenty of amenities. I must say these are the comfiest beds I have ever slept in. 10/10 would stay again.
Excelllent spot
Great park, very good clean amenities, the staff a very friendly and helpful. Short walk to the beach and not far from good shopping. Highly recommend.
Toller CP mit Zugang zum Ozean

We booked our motor home in for 3 nights, We were aware the site had a high percentage of perminent residents and also warned about the high prevalence of theft on the site but it did not prevent it happening to us.Also the amenity block was left in a disgusting state with users unwilling to flush or clean up after themselves. It was a shame because the location is good and the staff were friendly.
Perfect place for family holiday, and the beach will not disappoint you.

The cabin was fairly priced and the staff were helpful when booking. Location right on the beach and 10 minutes drive to Freo.

We're not fussy travellers but the cabin was dated, especially the bathroom. And the portacot we were given was dirty and had holes in the mesh, pretty gross actually. When we were leaving I was checking we hadn't left anything and bent down to look under the bed were I found dirty socks, which weren't ours. Probably wouldn't stay again.

Gute Anlage, dicht am Strand, nahe der Marina, Woolworth und snorkel Standort des Omeo Wracks.
Ruhig innen, Straßenlärm nur im Randbereich störend.
2 Laundry vorhanden mit
Wäschetrockenplätzen.
Room-Service auf Anforderung.
Tennisplatz und barbeque Platz direkt nebenan.

We have just had a couple of nights on a powered site.  The staff have been fantastic... very helpful, courteous and efficient. Thank you for going the extra mile for us.  It was most appreciated.   A big shout out to Carl.
Fantastic location and the cabins had everything you redded. Clean too. The whole park could have done with a small pool if possible.
Loved staying here.  Friendly, well maintained and easy access to perth city. Our base when visiting WA.

Wir waren auf Platz 95 für 7 Nächte. Wir hatten eine sehr gute Zeit. Die Nähe zum Strand war unglaublich und die Sonnenuntergänge so romatisch. Die Sanitärenanlagen waren sehr sauber. Die Camping Küche hat alles was man braucht, sogar einen Ofen, was wir sehr schätzten. Die Dauercamper haben uns gar nicht gestört. Wir haben sogar sehr interessante Gespräche mit ihnen geführt. Wir werden am 19. Januar bis 24. Januar 2026 wieder kommen. Wir hoffen wir bekommen nochmals Platz 95🙏, bevor wir Australien wieder verlassen müssen. Das einzige Negative war, dass fremde Leute, die nicht auf dem Camping wohnen den Code zu den Badanlagen wissen. Eines morgens kamen Teenager vom Party machen vom Strand und haben geduscht. Wäre gut wenn dieser Code ab und zu gewechselt würde.
Für eine Nacht ist das OK! Der Highway liegt gleich um die Ecke!

So glad we stayed at a powered site here during our 6 day visit to Freo
Location perfect
Friendly staff
Great amenities
Nice place to stay, clean amenities and right next to the beach.
Great caravan park, lots of shade!!! Great staff, amenities clean. Quick walk to beach, 5 minute drive to shops, fuel and 12 min drive to Freo.

We had an amazing weekend stay! Location is perfect! Omeo wreck and multiple coffee shops and restaurants within walking and/or cycling distance. We were warned to lock things away, due to accessibility of the park, which is understandable. We’ll be back for another weekend breakaway not far from home.

We spent 7 nights at the Caravan park so I’m able to give a general overview of how it went.
Location was pretty good obviously, however I have to say the overall experience doesn’t reflect the price we spent at all.
We had the worst caravan site, surrounded by bandicoots at night so be aware and also we didn’t feel to be in a Caravan park with tourists as it supposed to be but quite the opposite with long term living people, honestly quite uncomfortable.
Moreover we didn’t feel safe at all, anyone can entry the park by foot even junkies unfortunately at night.

Saying that, I understand that is not easy to handle some situations but at least top one priority has to be the safety of guests and making this place more attractive won’t be a bad idea.

Surely we won’t come back.
Good luck.
Great stay

My daughter booked the wrong date and tried to cancel online immediately without success.  She rang immediately and was told to call in the morning to cancel booking.  Did so and was told it was too late she would still be charged full price.  She meant to book for Friday night but it defaulted to next available booking being 26th check in 2pm.  How could that be too late when calling immediately after booking.Disgusting customer service , what a rip off!
We just stayed in the 2 bed standard cabins and loved it. Clean and tidy, Great location, lovely staff.
Great staff. Got a drive thru site for STD price.

It is a gorgeous spot? Mum and I can mark off It’s just a shame about all the big trees. I can guarantee that the caravan park doesn’t cover. You if a big branch lands on your caravan or car. It’s pretty frightening And. Hopefully they hurry up and fix the facilities because one facility block between the whole campsite is a little bit of a Letdown are you coming home after four hours being out and the caravan been unplugged? Haven’t seen it yet but it is frustrating other than that we give it a 5 star
Amazing friendly staff

I don't usually leave reviews but I feel I need to add some positive feedback. Some of those I read prior to our visit were very negative. James was most helpful in finding us a site for an extra night on arrival. He put us on a lovely large concrete slab, very welcome considering the rain we've had. He also came over & offered to securely store our bikes. While the amenities may be old, they're clean & have good hot showers. The location is great too, close to the beach, cafes & Fremantle. We have thoroughly enjoyed our stay here

Self contaioned only.
On the beach.
Free on off season no care taker.
Watch the sand flyes later in the afternoon
4 days their nice & reluxing.

I was enjoying a lovely day at the beach with my family when suddenly, a man who claimed to be the manager of Discovery Parks stormed up to us. He was incredibly aggressive and confrontational, and started filming us without our consent. He even filmed inside our open vehicles, which was a total invasion of privacy.

This manager, whose behavior was completely unacceptable, accused us of using the park's facilities without being guests. But here's the thing - I've never even stayed at the caravan park. And he didn't even try to confirm any details, he just started yelling and making assumptions.

The worst part was that he seemed to be targeting me, my friend, and another solo female who were all alone. There were several men in the car park with vans, but he ignored them and focused on us. It was like some sort of power play.

Another major concern I have is the lack of security on the park. The park is very open, and it's extremely easy for anyone to walk in without being checked or monitored. This lack of security is a major safety concern, and it's worrying that anyone can just walk onto the premises without being noticed.

I have video evidence of this aggressive manager, and I'm happy to share it with Discovery Parks if they want to follow up. But honestly, I hope they take immediate action to address this behavior and make sure their staff are trained to handle situations in a professional and respectful manner. I also hope they take steps to improve the security on the park, because it's currently a safety risk.

This experience left me feeling shaken and unsafe. I never thought I'd have a nightmare experience at a place I've visited for years. But thanks to this manager's aggressive behavior and the lack of security on the park, I'll be thinking twice about coming back here again.

This is the second time we have stayed here. Great location, close to the beach (walking distance), 20 minutes walk to the supermarket (woolworths) and other shops. The lizard Cafe is a great spot right by the beach the caters for breakfast, lunch etc, dine in or take away.

I am compelled to make this review despite not having stayed at this park.
While parked near the beach with a few other vans — a completely public space I’ve visited with my family for years — a man who I was informed is the manager of Discovery Parks approached us in an incredibly aggressive and confrontational manner. Without any introduction or explanation, he began filming us and even filmed inside our open vehicles without our consent. This was a blatant invasion of privacy, completely uncalled for, and left us all feeling shocked and uncomfortable.

He loudly accused us of using the park’s facilities without being guests, claiming to have CCTV footage of “multiple vans” doing so. However, he made no effort to confirm any details — no checking of number plates, no calm conversation — just assumptions, yelling, and unlawful filming. For the record: I have never stepped foot into the caravan park.

I fully understand that businesses need to protect their amenities — that’s fair. But the way this situation was handled was completely inappropriate. Aggressive behavior and filming private citizens in a public area, particularly inside their personal vehicles, is not only highly unprofessional, it’s likely unlawful.

I have video evidence of the individual who approached us and am more than happy to speak with someone from Discovery Parks directly if they wish to follow up. This experience was incredibly disappointing and not something I would ever expect from a company of this size and reputation.
I also will note that he only approached me, my friend and one other solo female, who were all alone- when there were also several men in the car park whom also had vans. Very interesting and quite obviously targeted and some sort of power play. Never thought I’d be feeling so unsafe in somewhere I’ve spent so much of my life.

We stayed on a powered site in our van.  While the caravan park is clean , well situated & the staff were wonderful, the layout isn't very well planned & some caravan sites are in single lane, dead end streets with no way to turn into the site unless you reverse the entire street.
So nice
Second time here absolutely love it

We visited the Coogee Beach WA Discovery Park over Easter/Anzac Day this year.  I understand that it’s Easter so should expect to pay a “premium” but the premium we paid did not reflect the quality that I would have expected of a Discovery Parks Cabin.  As I had always believed Discovery Parks to be of much better condition, I have decided to share this feedback with you as I was not able to include photos in the feedback survey that I completed and if this sort of sub standard “quality” is not reported, how do you know?||We paid $315 per night for a total of 5 nights ($1575).||The staff I encountered, whilst “friendly” were not particularly helpful.  They were merely “ticking the boxes” of being there.||The location was great.  The camp kitchen was very good. I suspect because the park permanent residents probably make sure the kitchen space is kept tidy and well looked after as they use it for their social club.  ||We spent the 2nd half of our visit on a powered site so got to use the amenities and they were for the most part, OK.  They were as I would expect them to be.||The cabin we were placed in was dirty, there were cobwebs in the toilet, and dirt on the floor.  There were broken things like the plastic holders for the blind chords and a tap in the kitchen with a piece broken off it.  The cabin walls need a coat of paint and hole’s fixed, the bathroom was terrible.

Nous nous étions trompé de date lors de la réservation pour un emplacement poir motorhome, sans doute une réservation faite trop rapidement avec le téléphone portable pendant qu'on était sur la route..
Nous sommes arrivé après les heures d'ouverture et la dame de la réception a été adorable avec nous.
Elle a tout fait pour trouver une solution alors qu'il n'y avait pas d'emplacements libres et elle a  trouvé une solution.
Merci beaucoup à elle 🙏

I was very disappointed when the power was shut off for almost a whole day for which I never got any notices. On that day we had plans to do washing n cooking but none of that happened. When I approached the office , they just said ‘Sorry’ . 2 hours on after my visit to the reception and no power yet!

We booked a powered site for 6 nights and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Location is fabulous. Quiet, shady park. Toilets and showers looked and smelt clean, way upon our list of visited caravan parks in our 3 months travelling.

Rooms were tidy, beds were comfy and the cabin was rather spacious.
The shower was rather tiny and pipes were old. So made noises if not at the right pressure. But the water was hot and amazing. Showers were made for tiny people haha

Location is nice and convenient for the beach. Extremely busy and noisy. So if you are after a quiet cabin or camping spot,  this is definitely not one!!
But we checked out on a Sunday when a triathlon was on. The set up and management of this triathlon was atrocious.  They were rude and abusive. Made us wait for 20 mins just to get out of the park. There was not enough notice, or communication from the park about this event when checking in or out.

Great location. Friendly staff. Some sites are very difficult to get into especially with a larger van. Walk to your site beforehand as some required reversing the length of the cul de sac to get in due to no swing room at the end. That said, I'd definitely go back. Short walk to sandy beach.
Wonderful service lovely cabins brilliant area

Booked a cabin via expedia, rang to check how to check after hours.
Told me there was a computer error and no room was available and kept my money tried to contact head office literally hung up on me complete crooks

Good luck trying to book through their ancient inept website. I tried through 3 different portals and couldn’t. Gave up. If I can’t even book on the first place, I’m not even goi bf to bother trying. It’s 2025. Catch up with the internet guys and you might get more visitors.
Great spot, right on the beach.
Is a great campsite with on site cabin's.The staff where great and helpful

Had an amazing experience! The receptionist, James, is a great dude—super friendly and treated us like family. He made us feel welcome from the moment we walked in. Highly recommend this place. And shout out to James.

We stayed in a 6 people cabin almost a year ago. Nice, clean and tidy, perfect for families, beach and playground nearby. Only issue is sand being dragged into the room by the kids, no matter what we did it ended up in the bed some how. Otherwise a lovely stay.

Extremely poor room cleanliness. First room had cobwebs and tiny spiders everywhere on the ceiling and the floor made my feet black in a matter of a few minutes.

They do provide a "mop" in the room which consists of a sponge on a long stick, but no floor cleaner. So even if their idea is you clean your own little cabin, you cant do it properly and they wont provide their own cleaning supplies to guests, it could be they dont have cleaning supplies?

I initially requested a room move which they couldnt accommodate due to being full (busy weekend) so i requested a refund and i was going to stay somewhere else but they refused.

Wasnt until my Wife went and complained again that they changed their tune.

Abhorrent experience, maybe stay here if you have a family you don't love and kids you neglect.

This terrific, affordable, little park, has a beachside location and a lovely, relaxed vibe.  It has a mixture  of unit accommodation for hire,  and plenty of shady sites for vans and motor homes.  The site allocated to our big motorhome, was spacious, and easy to access. There are many permanent residents, who over time, have developed and decorated their modest sites, with potplants and lush gardens,  These permanent dwellings, enhance the ambience  of a secure, friendly,  country village.   A gentle morning walk from your park location, along tidy paths and across one, minor, sand dune, and you are presented with a heart lifting vista, of white shore and sparkling, aqua water.  Fantastic beach for children in the morning.  The wind can get fiesty on the beach in the afternoon but the park itself is very sheltered.   | Ablution blocks  at the park are a little outdated but scrupulously clean and the water was always  hot whilst we were there.  |We hope the owners do not bow under pressure to sell this unique location to developers.  It is a gem of a spot for travellers looking for a true beachside experience.
Although this park wasn't for us as we wanted to bring the grandkids, its location on the beach was brilliant if you love the beach perfect spot.  James on reception gave exceptional service.
Old Kuditch loves to rest his weary bones right next to the beach either in a cabin or under his swag. I go here often when the need is there. Wonderful

Great location , should get it heritage listed so developers don’t gobble it up , great staff and management , great beach, close to Freo decent facilities but will benefit from upcoming renovations, park near by is bonus , nice pool and gourmet bbq and pizza oven would top it off nicely !
Great location and nice facilties. Excellent communication from staff
Excellent. Friendly staff, beautiful location.

The bed was like a 5 star hotel standard bed.  The room was close to the beach. It was a small room but cleaned well. Birds and trees keep the place natural. I have made another booking for December and will stay an extra night. Not too far away from Fremantle.

Love discovery parks coggee beach as when I was here the name of this lovely park was aspen discovery parks. As the cabins are lovely and cozy, always kept clean, would love to come back again and stay again. Very close to coggee beach, the staff are friendly and always helpful when I was here years ago. Never had a dispointed moment
Nice caravan park right on the beach..

Cheaper than the other parks, but there  is a good reason for that............                            |   The beach is nice though.  There is a  pleasant cooling breeze throughout the day. A great getaway from it all. The sounds of birds in the nice blue sky, with boats and waves,  we enjoyed our stay. At the beach.

In a nice location, a short walk to the beach, 15min drive to Fremantle. The facilities are a little run down, no park for kids etc. however we based ourselves here & explored Perth & found it in a good location, out of the hustle & bustle. The staff were lovely & provided the kids with a free activity book.
We have tryed to ring and make a booking... Had to leave a message and they said they would ring back. Twice we did this and still waiting after 2 days😡

It is a fantastic caravan park by the beach.  Close enough to Perth and Fremantle for convenience,  yet out of the rush. Convenient for Rottnest Island day trips.
My pick of parks within 30 mins of Perth.
Nice safe swimming beach, friendly staff and relaxed atmosphere 🏖👌

Good location right on beach. Cabin waa clean and well contained. Had issues with shower going cold, bath jets and Wifi not working. The playground was actually a public one outside of the accomodation. I would not say the accomodation was good value for money and would stay at Woodman Point next time
Best location next to the beach. Had swim every morning. A few improvements needed : need a few more fixed hanger in the shower room and soap holder in shower.

We stayed for 1 week & used the park as our base. Staff are very friendly & helpful. We booked our trip to Rottnest form here, staff took care of it all. We got picked up from the park & dropped off, didn't have to worry about anything.
Bus stop to Fremantle was right out front, they do take cash make sure you have the right amount as they don't give change out.

Excellent park facilities from laundry and ablutions block to the garden.|The access to the beach and shared travel path were welcomed as is the bus stop to Perth and Fremantle.|Would like to see noodle & board & snorkel gear for hire.|Loved the birds about the trees
The staff were very friendly and helpful. Large site, very clean facilities.
Great park right on beach friendly reception very nice clean amenities great shady site.  Enjoyed my stay would recommend and return.

Stayed in our caravan at this park. The staff were friendly, helpful & well organised & affient, always busy attending to the parks upkeep. The amenities were well maintained & cleaned regularly.
The sites were a good size with lovely shadey trees. An extra bonus having the beach path right there, with a great park with BBQ's, playground & cafe at the entry.
Wonderful! We will definitely be back.

Amazing location. Checked in late and received the sms code and check in stuff for late arrivals. Cabin was abit out dated. Bathroom floods while showering. Bed was super comfy. Wifi was not working on tv or phones so not sure if it was just a one off thing or not. Worth the stay for coogee beach though 👌

We stayed here recently while in Perth and had a great experience. The park manager was extremely helpful when we had some unexpected unfortunate circumstances within our family so I really recommend the service they provide.

The location is great being so close to the beach and a short drive / taxi / rideshare trip to Fremantle to enjoy all the attractions there.
Really good location. Love how close the beach is. Rooms are lovely and clean

Great location, with plenty of space. Brilliant stay there recently. James at the office, was super friendly and very helpful throughout our stay. Nice to be so close to the beach- we enjoyed the great walks and close proximity to the supermarket. Thanks! We will be back
An old park with cast majority being permanent. Tight sites with large overhanging trees.
Close to a beautiful beach walk tracts everywhere, amenities  old but very clean friendly staff,  thank you.

Stayed in our caravan, fantastic location, excellent bike tracks, make sure you go to the wreck at the end of the beach for snorkelling. We were on site 98 very short walk to the beach, afternoon sunsets absolutely gorgeous. Totally recommend, friendly staff.

Stayed here with my family in a cabin. It was clean, easy to organise and well priced.
The staff are all lovely people and very friendly. Clean and comfortable accommodation.
Perfectly situated between the Surf Life Saving Club and Coogie North Shopping Centre with all you need.
The Coogie Beach right out front and the Omeo Wreck just a tiny walk north for snorkelling made it ideal for my family. Highly recommend a stay here and the Bandicoots at night running around are hilarious and cute.
Caravan park is a bit rundown, but convenient if wanting to visit Perth or Fremantle.
Best place ever !! Best beach best food best people ! Have to book in advance but so worth it and so family friendly!

Excellent location within a short walk to the beach, to parkland and short drive to shops. The staff went above and beyond to ensure our stay was enjoyable - thank you all. The amenities were spotless, even had good quality paper towel so you didn’t have to stand in front of air dryers. There were plenty of trees for good shade and double concrete sites. An awesome experience and recommend for short or long term stay. 👍👍

Unsafe! Unsafe! Unsafe!
Bikes stolen daily.
No security/ CCTV. No staff present after 5.
Cabin dirty on arrival.
Avoid!
Was good for the price n location
Close to the beqch. Facilities well kept and gardens a pleasure to visit
Well its the best for friendly staff if you have a problem and need help they are there to sort it out for you
Great place friendly staff and people. Close to beach
Posto ottimo, tranquillo e personale efficiente. Manca un piccolo market per acquisti generi alimentari . Prezzi un po' alti.Internet ha funzionato  a tratti

We stayed in a Standard Cabin, the bed was comfortable, plenty of room in the living area and kitchen, the bathroom was a bit small. Everything was clean. Very close to the beach, the nets are a short walk up the beach.

Love this place!
We keep coming back all the way from Victoria
Lovely location with just mins walk to beautiful Coogee Beach. Definitely recommend this if looking for a place to stay while on holidays or just a weekend getaway

GANGSTERS PARADISE!!!

What once must have been a great place for holidaying, is now sadly a treasure trove for professional thieves! We have had our E-bike stolen during our stay at this park. And have discovered there are E-bikes stolen on a daily basis. Professional thieves are foraging the camp grounds at night, and no proper safety measures are introduced to deter or capture these criminals. We found out this has been happening for a long time, at an alarmingly high rate of 1 vehicle / night, yet we were uninformed of the seriousness of the situation and it appears the manager would rather see this matter ignored than take any appropriate action to ensure the safety of park visitors. The entire eastern perimeter of the park is fenced by a very low decade old fence and anyone can effortlessly enter the park. This is what has happened to us, and these professionals were only a meter away from our bed and must have been keeping a very close watch late at night, after which we took the bike out and securely locked it up and made sure it was hidden from the main road. This is no longer a SAFE place, and if you have young children, I would not trust them to be safe at this park. Unsecure entry points everywhere

We've stayed here a few times now, yes it's pretty basic but we're camping we don't need fancy and it has everything you need.

The location is so good, I love that it's on the beach front and the kids love the park and all the grass to play on.

On this occasion I went to start my car to checkout and a light had been left on so the battery was dead. Wayne, who works there came and put it on charge and sorted it all out for me while I went to the beach. You honestly don't get that type of service in many places anymore. So grateful for him and his help. Thank you so much, can't wait to stay again 😀

I enjoyed my stay in early December last year but when I checked out I was badgered to leave a review. Not once but THREE TIMES!! First it was the young bloke in the office and then I received two e-mails. I e-mailed management straight away and was informed that I "should have" received two messages with a link for a review. On the 27th of December, after staying at another one of the parks, I was badgered to leave a review for them too. I e-mailed Discovery Parks administration and after a fortnight I e-mailed them again asking why they hadn't replied. I pointed out the level of disrespect for paying customers is ridiculous. I got a reply within a few days saying that the e-mail had been sent to the marketing team. Today I sent a follow up e-mail asking why I hadn't been contacted about this and I don't know whether I'll get a reply. I don't care. Discovery Parks are one of the most disrespectful companies I have encountered and I certainly don't appreciate being ignored when I've happily paid so much money for a patch of dirt to throw my tent on. If I ever stay there again I know what to expect but I think the likelihood of that happening is very low.

Our experience with the Coogee beach caravan park has mixed emotions.

When we first arrived we were a bit heart broken, we had spent a considerable amount of money on a very tight checkerboard caravan sight,
We had a challenge getting our 22 ft van in, eventually we had to manoeuvre around and go through someone else’s sight. Getting out when we left was just as much of a challenge .

It was an extra $20 per child per night, which I thought  was over priced considering there are no activities or swimming pools at the park for children.

On a high note we found the beach walk to be very enjoyable, the jetty was a couple hundred meters away from camp which was lovely, adventure world was 15 minutes down the road, and there is a nice park just next door.

Definitely could work on their caravan sites but all in all once we were in we enjoyed our stay. We have given 2 stars for rooms and 4 stars for location giving them 3 stars from us! 😊

Caravan sites shady. Amenities old but mostly clean.  Very disappointed that no warnings were given of ongoing prevalent night time theft until after check-in. Don’t expect that your bikes are safe bolted onto their racks as the thieves carry bolt cutters.  One couple woke to their campervan being “rocked” while thieves stole a bike off  the front of their van.  Our grandsons bike was stolen from the rack off the front of van two nights before theirs.   Permanents say it’s been going on for years and management do nothing about the fence.  Our van backed onto a permanent resident who had 3 cctv cameras. While I understand why, I did not like the feeling of being watched the entire time I was outside my van.  Do not recommend this caravan park.

DO NOT STAY HERE!!!!
Terrible park, old run down, not worth the money. We stayed 4 nights, each night bikes were stolen including my brothers, bike was chained up on bike rack however was still cut and taken off. Managers of the park couldn’t care less, said they would help but ultimately did nothing.
If you want a safe caravan park and to leave with all your belongings this should be the last place you stay!!

Stayed here for two nights and will just say this: avoid if you can. Location is simply not worth it.

While we were there:
- a number of cabins / people were behaving in an appalling manner (drunk, screaming, breaking bottles and more) till early hours of the morning.
- a number of people (not staying at the park) were just roaming through the camp at night time. A number of other campers mentioned theft happening (bikes, clothes).
- police arrived twice during the night

Will not stay again. First time having such a negative experience at a Discovery Park.
Schöner Park, gute Toiletten und Duschen.

Have been coming here in our caravan for 13 years. However we're becoming very disappointed with this park. Prices have skyrocketed over the last 3 years. Yet the site has moved into what looks like disrepair. We noticed that since Discovery Parks were waiting on the council for a renewed lease, they (DP) have not spent money on upkeep. DP have now a new lease and will eventually be doing some redevelopment. It appears DP are not spending money while they sort out what they will do 😔

Happily reminds me of the caravan parks we visited regularly as kids in the 90's. Its old but clean, functions perfectly fine and has all we needed. Handy large park and playground next door for a kick of soccer or throw of the frisbee. The beach being so close was perfection, we walked down with the kids whenever we wanted to, dawn to dusk. Jumped off the jetty, walked down to the Omeo Shipwreck for a snorkel, lazed on the beach.
We stayed in our caravan and had lovely neighbours and no issues.
Didn't manage to have a play on the tennis courts but will try to make the time next time.
Having Woolworths so close too was really helpful!
Friendly staff. Upon departure, we booked for the same time next year, but an extra day.
Took caravan for a stay over Christmas want to extend stay but place was booked out unfortunately
good campsite
We had a lovely sea side rendevous & relaxation 2 mins walk to the beach

We enjoyed our stay. We were lucky enough to have a powered site under a tree. Facilities are older style but I prefer that to be honest.|We were able to walk along beach track in each direction to coffee shops/eateries. |Staff were very friendly - reception, gardener.|Loved the pool. Would definitely return.|Sites were a good size.
Lovely location! Easy to get to and navigate through.

Would give the cabin we stayed in  a negative star if there was the option.  The lady at reception was nice but as soon as i entered the gates my heart sank.  The area is untidy and overgrown.  As i approached our cabin #93 my heart sunk even more the exterior was shabby and run down trees overgrown and cobwebs everywhere.  Heart just stopped when i opened the door disgusting smell, and to my standards just filthy and the aircon was not working properly (middle of heat wave). We looked for other accomodation straight away but there was none available.  Went to coles to buy cleaning products and cleaned what we could still felt dirty.  Used our own linen on top  of their beds.  Worst stay of my life.  Do not recommend there cabins.

Decrepit accomodation. Doors broken. Timber Rotten. Falling apart. Poorly maintained. Not clean. Unacceptable. False advertising, staff admitted photos are photoshopped. Travelled interstate, very disappointed.
Location is the only redeeming factor.

Horrid experience. We have stayed in so so many discovery parks, this being by far the worst. Cabin was dirty, and broken. Beds were horrible. When contacted the property manager, we were told 'I know how the cabin is. That was the only cabin left'.
We moved interstate and were waiting on our cargo. The day it arrived we left (4 nights out of 8 paid) and only returned on checkout day to give in the keys. Couldn't stay any longer than needed in that shabby, dirty, smelly cabin.

Service was friendly & efficient. Room was clean & well appointed. Great location, right on the beach & close to south Fremantle. We had a budget cabin which was really a glorified donga, tiny. As with all accommodation these days it was over priced at $140/night but in a normal world only worth about $80/night due to age of building & park & size of room.

Totally unacceptable living conditions, lots of hanging dust and spiders around the corners. Toilet is small and showering area is ultra-small. For me to pay au$219 and enduring the poor standards is just too absurd. Though the location is very decent, I urge you to think twice before committing your money the cabins in Coogee beach as nobody wants a dirty area to sleep on.
Beautiful location for an overnight stay. Clean spacious self contained dwelling in beautiful bush

The location is amazing, but the cabin quality was poor. We were disappointed in the bathroom (which felt dirty and old), including the shower floor which seemed a little wobbly. The kitchen was clean and tidy, with good utensils. Bedroom was small and a little cramped, but otherwise good and clean. Plently of little daddy long legs spiders kept us company too.
We stayed in our own caravan at this site for about four weeks. It was friendly, quiet and clean . There is also a laundry on site with washing machine, tumble dryers and iron.
Location amazing, room basic but comfortable
Very enjoyable stay. Wonderful location. Highlyrecommended
Quiet park, easy beach access,
Great park, close to the beach. Staff is friendly.

Ein deprimierender Campingplatz. Viele alte Cabins, die scheinbar dauerbewohnt sind, brüchige Steine, Gerümpel rund um die Cabins, eine altmodische Küche, die schon um 21 Uhr abgeschlossen ist, ungepflegte Grünanlagen… Wir haben hier auf der Heimreise zwei Nächte gestanden. Die Nähe zum Meer ist der einzige Pluspunkt. Und die Klos sind sauber, aber wie alles andere altmodisch. Nächstes Mal suchen wir uns definitiv einen anderen Platz.
Great Park, an awesome location. Friendly service. Thank you for the early check-in.
Relaxing

This place was in a good location, quiet and seemed to have a lot of facilities though I just had a brief stay so didn't use them. Very limited opening hours for check-in (open 9am to 5pm) but the process to get an after hours key was straightforward. I got asked to send a picture of my ID though, which seemed weird as I've never been asked to do this before until this holiday but it seems like it's a WA thing as I keep being asked for ID at accommodation rather than just a credit card? Hopefully it's deleted after the fact for privacy reasons. Then I got asked to go to reception in the morning to finish checking in with a signed form but I was leaving early and it wasn't open so just left the keys (didn't want to leave a form with all my details in an unsecured keybox).

Overall I thought it was expensive at $140 for the quality of the room so hence the lower stars, usually I've paid about $100-120 around similar locations in Australia for the size and amenities and the fact it's off season. It was quite rundown in the room which I'm ok with when the price is cheap but it wasn't. Two main issues came up as well - the bed was on wheels and moving around in bed made it wheel away from the wall, so annoying. Had to create make-shift stoppers to get it to stay still. Also the wifi was unusable in my cabin and I only had 3g data inside (5g outside so maybe they are little Faraday cages :P).

We had a caravan site tucked up the back amungst mostly permanent residents (park appears to be mostly permanent residents). Although the park was clean, tidy, great location and reception were helpful we were not thrilled with our site. We had a paved site and the pavers were covered in old peeling paint which inevitably tracked into our van and the edges were all cracked and chipped which was hazardous. The other van sites near the entrance to the park appeared to be in a much better condition.
Trop clean et un vrai sentiment de liberté
